creator: h.eichmann@gmx.de
text:
Hallo!

Due to some reals life changes my free time is currently very limited. Furthermore I do not have a computer with FreeBSD anymore. As I do not see this changing in the near future I have to drop the maintainership of my remaining ports. I think they are:

german/de-tipp10
multimedia/streamanalyze
ports-mgmt/portdowngrade
sysutils/gpkgdep
sysutils/k3b
x11-fm/krusader
x11-fonts/manu-gothica
x11/kde3-apireference

At least one of them (k3b) has need some maintainer attention.

I would like to thank all of the FreeBSD contributors, who helped me in porting and maintaining these ports for their help and for the good time I had with FreeBSD.


Best regards,


Heiner
